title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.text:
One day, while out and about with Biwa
Hayahide...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Those are so cute. I remember how much I used to
love plushies.

She's looking at a claw machine filled with little
Umamusume plushies.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Brian and I used to have matching plushies when
we were young.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It's hard to even imagine her playing with one
now...

Her wistful expression as she gazes at the plushies
gives me an idea.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
A plushie at my age? Hmm. That's an interesting
proposal.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It might be good to get back in touch with my
inner child. But first, let's see if you can get one
at all.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You sound pretty confident! Show me your best,
then, Trainer!
There's no way I can fail now!
